meaning: n.库尔德人(主要居住在伊拉克、伊朗、土耳其及叙利亚边界的地区)
examples: Jalal Talabani, a Kurd, who was re-elected president by the parliament, asked Al-Maliki to form an administration.
President Jalal Talabani, a Kurd, and the US ambassador to Iraq, Christopher Hill, voiced support for the amended version.
